title: Intense Umami Thai Bread Larb
description: A quick-fix Thai dish featuring bread, ferment, and umami flavors, this larb is perfect for a snack or light meal. It is ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly and has a chewy texture.
instructions: Toast the bread until it is crispy and golden brown.
In a blender or food processor, blend the mushroom paste, soy sauce, fish sauce, lime juice, and chili flakes until well combined.
Add the fermented bean paste to the blender and blend until smooth.
Chop the toasted bread into small pieces and add it to the blender.
Blend the mixture until the bread is well coated with the umami sauce.
Transfer the mixture to a bowl and stir in the chopped scallions and cilantro.
Serve the larb immediately, garnished with additional scallions and cilantro if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
